title: Kuro’s Plan Against Kaya Is Revealed
description: On pages 4–7, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: It was you who made me fall down! And now you're blaming me?!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I couldn't help it! Better one person fall down than both of us!

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: Then you should've been the one to fall!

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: You bastard! You just said North, you didn't even tell me which way North is!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: It was your fault for running so fast!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I was just trying to help you!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Don't tell me you guys are finished just from one blow from those fools?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Listen! We don't have time to waste here!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Since the opponent is strong, we must be stronger...

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: After I say "1, 2, Jango" you guys will become stronger!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: And you will become much stronger than before!!

dialogue.speaker: Jango
dialogue.text: It must be hypnotism! He's trying to make them think they're stronger!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: They were still shaky just a while ago!

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
